Quiz.title: Quiz
Quiz.description: A quiz template containing metadata and creator info.

description.description: A short summary of the quiz content.

creatorId.description: The UID of the user who created this quiz.

backgroundImageUrl.description: Global background image URL for the quiz.

Question.title: Question
Question.description: A single question within a quiz.

correctIndex.description: The index of the correct option in the options array.

timeLimit.description: Time allowed for this question in seconds.

quizId.description: Reference to the Quiz being played.

pin.description: A unique 6-digit PIN for players to join.

questionStartedAt.description: Timestamp (ms) when the current question was displayed.

questionEndsAt.description: Timestamp (ms) when the current question window expires.

isPaused.description: Whether the game is temporarily paused.

backgroundImageUrl.description: Realtime background image URL for the session.

Player.title: Player
Player.description: A participant in a game session.

name.description: Display name selected by the player.

lastCorrect.description: Whether the last response was correct.

lastResponseTime.description: Time taken for the last answer in ms.

Response.title: Response
Response.description: A player's answer to a specific question.

uid.description: The UID of the responding player.

choice.description: The indexed choice made by the player.

score.description: Points awarded for this specific response.

/game_sessions/{sessionId}/responses/{re.description: Individual answers for auditing and scoring.
